subcodes.first_line: We, verily, have heard thy voice and seen that thou hast turned thy face unto us. We, in turn, have turned Our gaze unto thee from this Sublime Horizon
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و راینا اقبالک اقبلنا الیک من هذا الافق الاعلی لتشکر ربک بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
